problemDefinition.observedWindow: W0-W3 actual sales are visible to the model
problemDefinition.lookupBehavior: The system uses product_id to retrieve product attributes, actual sales momentum, price/discount, store/restock signals, category benchmark, and Google Trends.

splitPolicy.method: Product-level deterministic 70/15/15 split by external_code hash

model.type: Ridge regression, one model per forecast horizon
